name: Lentil Pasta Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup lentils (brown or red or both)
2 cups water (use the tomato sauce can's water)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Add onions and garlic, and sauté until golden brown.
2. Add lentils, tomato, Tobasco sauce, Contadina Tomato Sauce, water, oregano, basil, parsley, and black pepper to the skillet. Stir to combine.
3. Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce heat to low and simmer for about 30 minutes, stirring occasionally, until the lentils are cooked through and the sauce has thickened. Add more water if needed.
4. Serve over capellini pasta with garlic bread and a green salad dressed with balsamic vinegar. Enjoy this heart-healthy recipe!
